name: Sourdough French Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve yeast in warm water.
2. Add the rest of the ingredients. Mix and knead lightly.
3. Return to the bowl to rise until double.
4. Turn out onto a floured board and divide dough into two parts.
5. Shape dough parts into oblongs and then roll them up tightly, beginning with one side.
6. Seal the outside edge by pinching and shape into desired size.
7. Place loaves on greased baking sheet and let rise until double again.
8. Make diagonal cuts on top of loaves with a razor blade or very sharp knife.
9. Brush lightly with water for a crisp crust.
10. Bake at 400 degrees F for about 25 minutes, or until brown and done.
NOTE:
Makes 2 loaves at 18 slices each. Also note the serving sizes in all of these recipes is guesstimate. It all depends on the serving size you select.
